name: Edoxudine
description: Edoxudine is also known as 5-Ethyl-2'-deoxyuridine. It is a thymidine analogue with antiviral and anticancer properties. *In vitro* studies demonstrates the inhibitory effect of edoxudine on the replication of herpes simplex virus type 1 (HSV-1) and 2 (HSV-2) via being phosphorylated by HSV-infected cells and getting incorporated into viral DNA. Its clinical use is still being studied.
